description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a prominent balcony running along the upper floor on three sides. The exterior features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a sleek, contemporary appearance. The balcony is enclosed with blue-tinted glass railings and is accented by a potted plant, adding a touch of greenery. The ground floor includes a wide entryway and a garage door, both integrated into the minimalist facade. The house is surrounded by a paved driveway and walkway, emphasizing its urban setting. The overall design is characterized by clean lines, geometric forms, and a monochromatic color palette with blue highlights.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, glass balconies, large windows, and a paved driveway, featuring a sleek and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large glass windows, sliding doors, and a balcony with blue-tinted glass railings and a potted plant.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous balcony and the flat roof, with the paved driveway extending from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage door, symmetrical window arrangement, and the extended driveway leading to the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the balcony wrapping around and the flat roof, with a clear view of the paved area adjacent to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide glass door entryway with no steps, integrated into a minimalist facade, and a garage door adjacent to the main entrance.
